target.title: test(agents): add unit tests for exec output rendering helpers
target.body:
## Summary

- Add unit tests for `renderExecOutputText` and `renderExecUpdateText` functions in `src/agents/bash-tools.exec-output.ts`
- Verify output rendering behavior including placeholder handling and warning text placement
- Improve test coverage for exec output rendering module

## Test Coverage

Tests cover the following scenarios:
- Placeholder for empty/undefined output
- Preserving newlines in output
- Warning text placement
- Multiple warnings handling
- Empty warnings array with tailText
- Undefined tailText with warnings

## Verification

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/bash-tools.exec-output.test.ts
```

```
Test Files  1 passed (1)
     Tests  12 passed (12)
  Duration  420ms
```

## Regression Test Plan

- Coverage level: Unit test
- Target test file: `src/agents/bash-tools.exec-output.test.ts`
- Scenario locked in: Exec output rendering
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: Tests verify the exact rendering logic for exec output, preventing regression when the function is modified.
target.author: dwc1997
